description: Global Support Corp — USA — Management Fee — HIDDEN DIVIDEND RISK

input.substance_notes: US Parent charging management fees to Polish subsidiary. No local Transfer Pricing (TP) benchmark available for 2026. KAS recharacterizes as hidden dividend due to lack of market-price evidence.

expected.eval_note: Recharacterized as dividend (19%) due to missing TP documentation and weak economic justification. Art. 21.1.2a CIT baseline 20% would apply if classified as intangible service, but 19% applies as 'hidden dividend'.
